title: Raid Captain Effect 突襲隊長效果
description:
After 24w13a and above, change back to the old version to get the effect directly from the raid captain.
24w13a以上改回舊版直接從突襲隊長上獲得效果。
body:
# Raid Captain Effect 突襲隊長效果 Minecraft 24w13a changed killing the raid captain to drop Ominous Bottle, instead of directly giving the Bad Omen effect.
This pack/mod will kill the Raid Captain and still directly give the Bad Omen effect.

*There will still be a 30 second waiting time after triggering the raid

Minecraft 24w13a把殺死突襲隊長改為掉落不祥之瓶，而不是直接給不祥之兆效果，
此資料包/模組就是將殺死突襲隊長依然會直接給予不祥之兆效果。

*觸發突襲後會依然會有30秒等待時間
## Download 下載 ● Datapack
● Fabric/Forge/Qutii (NeoForge is not supported)

Mod versions is the same as datapack, but it will automatically apply to all worlds, usually on servers.
If you don't want to apply to all worlds, please use datapack.
Fabric requires Fabric API, Quilt requires Quilted Fabric API

模組版本與資料包功能相同，但是會自動套用於所有世界，通常用於伺服器。
如果你不希望套用於所有世界，請使用資料包。
Fabric 需要 Fabric API，Quilt 需要 Quilted Fabric API
---- 您可以在任何模組包中自由使用此模組，只要下載內容仍然託管在 Modrinth 生態系統中。
You may freely use this mod in any modpack, as long as the download remains hosted within the Modrinth ecosystem.
